title: HostChooseMethod
description: Contract for host.choose JSON-RPC method. Caller passes absolute path from Electron native dialog; Go initialises .agents/skills if needed and persists the host.

HostChooseRequest.title: HostChooseRequest
HostChooseRequest.description: Params for host.choose. Path must be absolute; obtained from Electron showOpenDialog before calling.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the chosen Skill Host Folder

HostChooseResponse.title: HostChooseResponse
HostChooseResponse.description: Result of host.choose. Errors: validation_error (1001) if path invalid; filesystem_error (1002) if .agents/skills cannot be created.

initialized.description: true if .agents/skills directory was created by this call
